falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score above 60 would indicate extreme market pressure, contradicting the current HOLD signal and suggesting a potential reversal rather than continuation of the pattern.

falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above the 2022 May Luna bottom's 38.2% Fibonacci retracement level (specific price: $X.XX) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Breaking above this key retracement level would invalidate the pattern's bearish structure, proving the current UNKNOWN verdict incorrect by showing stronger bullish momentum.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume surges to 3x the 20-day average volume on a single day within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a volume spike would indicate a major market shift, falsifying the HOLD signal by showing either a blowoff top or a confirmed breakout that contradicts the current pattern analysis.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
